patches.summary: Populate learn_init.go with NFL/NBA/MLB/MLS team rosters, ESPN ticker patterns, and sports stopwords; sweep tool stub-emits empty defaults.
patches.reason: Pilot of plan 2026-05-23-002 shipped the self-learning loop with empty defaults. Real seeds unlock entity-aware recall + pattern extraction for ESPN's killer flow ('Niners game tonight' resolves to the right event via alias). Future sweep re-runs will overwrite this until side-car infrastructure lands.
patches.validated_outcome: Fresh-HOME run populates entity_lookups with 413 rows across nfl_team/nba_team/mlb_team/mls_team; recall extracts aliases (Niners, Cowboys, Lakers) as query_entities.

patches.summary: Invoke runLearnInitOnce from rootCmd.PersistentPreRunE so initLearn actually fires; sweep tool emits the function but no caller.
patches.reason: runLearnInitOnce and the learnHookSkipList framework ship in every sweep-installed CLI but have zero callers in internal/cli — the sweep tool emits the seed function and the gate predicate but never wires the invocation. Without this hook, the seeds in patch espn-learn-seeds populate nothing at runtime. Affects all 5 pilots from plan 2026-05-23-002 (espn, contact-goat, company-goat, podcast-goat, instacart); upstream sweep-tool fix should retrofit the other 4.
patches.validated_outcome: Fresh-HOME teach with --no-learn skips initLearn; without it, entity_lookups gets 413 rows on first learn-aware command. shouldSkipLearnHook keeps doctor/sync/auth/version/etc. from paying the init cost.
